title: centella cochlearia
intro: Centella cochlearia, also known as bitter water centella or lesser centaury, is a low-growing perennial plant native to Europe and western Asia, characterized by its small, yellow or greenish flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial. The health benefits of Centella cochlearia include improving digestive health, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used in traditional folk remedies.
